# Test fixtures

Sample PDFs used by the parsing/diff/rendering integration tests referenced in
`docs/BACKLOG.md` (stories 1.2, 1.3, 2.1, 2.2, 2.3): a small multi-page text PDF, a
mismatched-page-count pair, a scanned/image-only PDF, and a 50+ page document for the
large-document story. Added alongside the tests that consume them during BUILD — kept
out of the initial scaffold to avoid committing binary fixtures before they're needed.
